assertions.expectation: Explains that surge upgrades require extra compute capacity (maxSurge creates NEW nodes before draining old ones)
assertions.reason: Response explains that surge nodes can't be created due to quota constraints and describes how surge upgrades work by creating additional capacity

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting maxUnavailable >0 instead of relying on maxSurge (drains first, then creates — uses less quota)
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends setting max-surge=0 and max-unavailable=1, which drains nodes first instead of creating new ones

assertions.expectation: Warns that maxUnavailable >0 means reduced capacity during upgrade — some pods won't have nodes
assertions.reason: Mentions 'Higher disruption as pods are evicted during upgrade' and 'brief service disruption', indicating awareness of capacity reduction

assertions.expectation: Suggests temporarily scaling down non-critical deployments to free up quota for surge nodes
assertions.reason: Does not mention scaling down deployments; instead focuses on cleaning up unused resources and changing upgrade strategy

assertions.expectation: Mentions that reducing maxSurge to 1 minimizes extra quota needed (slower but fits within constraints)
assertions.reason: Option 4 shows reducing surge settings to max-surge=1 as a way to minimize surge requirements

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to update surge settings (maxSurge=0, maxUnavailable=1 for zero-extra-capacity mode)
assertions.reason: Provides exact gcloud command with --max-surge=0 --max-unavailable=1 parameters

assertions.expectation: Recommends doing the upgrade in off-peak hours when fewer pods are running
assertions.reason: Does not mention timing the upgrade for off-peak hours or when fewer pods are running

assertions.expectation: Mentions requesting a temporary quota increase as a faster alternative to a permanent increase
assertions.reason: Does not suggest requesting a temporary quota increase, only acknowledges that permanent increase will take a week
